title: Street Food Tour
Tour Ẩm Thực Đường Phố
desc: Night market street food crawl — eating everything in sight until you can't walk
Lượn chợ đêm ăn sập hàng — ăn tất cả mọi thứ cho đến khi không bước nổi
neg: blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, low quality
style: vibrant night market lighting, warm street food atmosphere, neon glow, cinematic candid
chs: Arriving Hungry
Đến Nơi Đói Meo
Empty stomach, full wallet. Let's destroy this night market 🔥🍢
Bụng rỗng, ví đầy. Quẩy chợ đêm thôi 🔥🍢

Portrait of {subject} walking into a bustling night market entrance, colorful neon signs and food stall lights glowing, crowds of people, eyes wide scanning all the food stalls with excitement, warm evening atmosphere, steam rising from nearby stalls
First Bite
Miếng Đầu Tiên
First stall and I'm already in love. These skewers are INSANE 😍🍡
Quầy đầu tiên đã phải lòng rồi. Xiên nướng này ĐỈNH QUÁ 😍🍡

Portrait of {subject} taking a big bite of a grilled skewer at a street food stall, eyes closing in pleasure, warm grill fire glowing in background, smoke and steam surrounding the scene, vendor grilling food behind, night market neon lights
Noodle Stop
Trạm Mì
Found the noodle grandma everyone talks about. 30 years same spot. Legend 🍜👵
Tìm được quán mì bà ngoại huyền thoại. 30 năm cùng một chỗ. Huyền thoại 🍜👵

Portrait of {subject} sitting on a tiny plastic stool at a street noodle stall, slurping noodles from a steaming bowl, chopsticks in hand, small street-side setting with hanging light bulbs, an elderly vendor cooking in the background, authentic street food atmosphere
Too Many Options
Quá Nhiều Lựa Chọn
Holding food in both hands and still eyeing the next stall. I have no self-control 😂🤷
Hai tay cầm đồ ăn mà mắt vẫn liếc quầy kế bên. Không kiểm soát nổi bản thân 😂🤷

Portrait of {subject} standing in the middle of a night market holding different street foods in both hands, looking sideways at another food stall with a guilty but excited expression, multiple food stalls with colorful signage around, warm ambient lighting from string lights above
Sweet Tooth
Đồ Ngọt Gọi Tên
Dessert stomach is REAL. Mango sticky rice don't miss 🥭✨
Bụng phụ cho đồ ngọt là CÓ THẬT. Xoài nếp cái này không thể bỏ qua 🥭✨

Portrait of {subject} holding a beautiful dessert plate of mango sticky rice at a colorful dessert stall, taking a photo of it with phone before eating, night market fairy lights twinkling behind, warm golden lighting, happy satisfied expression
Food Coma
Coma Ẩm Thực
Can't move. Ate too much. Send help. Best night ever tho 🫠💫
Không nhúc nhích nổi. Ăn quá trời. Gọi cứu trợ. Nhưng đêm nay tuyệt nhất 🫠💫

Portrait of {subject} sitting on a bench near the night market exit, leaning back with hands on full stomach, blissful exhausted expression, empty food containers nearby, night market lights glowing softly in the background, warm relaxed atmosphere

Confused tablespoon with teaspoon. Added 3x the salt. We're off to a great start 🧂😬
Nhầm muỗng canh với muỗng cà phê. Cho gấp 3 muối. Khởi đầu tuyệt vời 🧂😬

Portrait of {subject} staring at the measuring spoons in hand with a horrified realization expression, over-salted dish on the stove, one hand on forehead, the recipe on phone showing correct measurement, kitchen starting to look chaotic, sinking feeling visible on face
Total Chaos
Hỗn Loạn Toàn Diện
Something is burning. Something is boiling over. The fire alarm is my background music now 🚨🎵
Cái gì đó đang cháy. Cái gì đó đang tràn. Chuông báo cháy là nhạc nền giờ 🚨🎵

Portrait of {subject} in a kitchen with pot boiling over on one burner, something smoking on another, frantically trying to handle both with oven mitts, hair disheveled, sauce splattered on apron, pure kitchen chaos, dramatic steam and smoke, panicked but determined expression
The Pivot
Xoay Chuyển
Okay NEW PLAN. Adding random stuff from the fridge. We're improvising now 🎭🧄
Okay KẾ HOẠCH MỚI. Thêm đồ ngẫu nhiên từ tủ lạnh. Giờ là ứng biến 🎭🧄

Portrait of {subject} standing at open fridge grabbing random ingredients, determined creative expression, discarded original recipe visible on counter, the dish on the stove looking different now, adding herbs and spices freestyle, mad scientist energy in the kitchen
Wait... It's Good?
Khoan... Ngon Hả?
Tasted the accidental creation and... WHAT. This is actually INCREDIBLE?? 🤯🍽️
Nếm thử sáng tạo tình cờ và... GÌ VẬY. Cái này NGON THIỆT LUÔN?? 🤯🍽️

Portrait of {subject} tasting from a spoon with an expression of absolute shock and disbelief, eyes wide open, the improvised dish looking surprisingly beautiful in the pan, one hand on chest in amazement, the kitchen is still a disaster zone but the food is a triumph
Accidental Masterpiece
Kiệt Tác Tình Cờ
Failed the recipe. Created a new dish. Sometimes the best things are accidents 🏆😋✨
Hỏng công thức. Sáng tạo món mới. Đôi khi thứ tốt nhất là tình cờ 🏆😋✨

Portrait of {subject} proudly plating the accidental masterpiece on a nice plate, the dish looking colorful and delicious despite its chaotic origin, messy kitchen visible behind but the plate is beautiful, triumphant proud smile, warm home lighting, the ultimate cooking underdog story

title: CrossFit Beast Mode
CrossFit Chế Độ Quái Thú
desc: Intense CrossFit WOD that pushes every limit — sweat, chalk, and pure determination
WOD CrossFit cường độ cao đẩy mọi giới hạn — mồ hôi, phấn, và quyết tâm thuần khiết
neg: blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, low quality, feminine, casual, relaxed
style: raw industrial CrossFit box, dramatic harsh lighting, chalk dust, sweat, intense athletic photography
chs: WOD Board
Bảng WOD
Read today's WOD on the board. My soul left my body. Let's go anyway 💀🏋️
Đọc WOD hôm nay trên bảng. Linh hồn rời khỏi cơ thể. Nhưng vẫn chiến 💀🏋️

Portrait of {subject} standing in front of a CrossFit whiteboard reading the workout of the day, jaw slightly dropped at the intensity, chalk-covered hands at sides, industrial CrossFit box with rigs and equipment behind, overhead dramatic lighting, the calm before the storm
Chalk Up
Phấn Tay
Chalking up like my life depends on it. Because right now it kinda does 🤲💨
Bôi phấn như sống chết phụ thuộc vào đó. Vì lúc này đúng là vậy 🤲💨

Portrait of {subject} clapping chalk-covered hands together, white chalk cloud exploding in the air, intense focused eyes visible through the chalk dust, pull-up rig behind, CrossFit box atmosphere, dramatic lighting catching the chalk particles, pre-workout ritual
Olympic Lifts
Nâng Tạ Olympic
Clean and jerk at 90%. Every rep is a conversation with God 🏋️‍♂️🙏
Clean and jerk 90%. Mỗi rep là cuộc trò chuyện với Chúa 🏋️‍♂️🙏

Portrait of {subject} mid-clean and jerk, barbell at shoulder height about to drive overhead, chalk on hands and thighs, intense strain on face, veins visible, weight plates clearly showing, CrossFit box floor with rubber mats, dramatic overhead lighting, peak power moment
Wall Balls
Wall Balls
Wall balls are proof that simple doesn't mean easy. Rep 40 and my legs are filing for divorce 🏀🦵😫
Wall balls chứng minh đơn giản không có nghĩa dễ. Rep 40 và chân đòi ly dị 🏀🦵😫

Portrait of {subject} throwing a wall ball up at the target on the wall, squatting deep with the ball, sweat dripping everywhere, exhausted determined expression, CrossFit box wall with target mark, other athletes working out in background, gritty raw fitness photography
Burpee Hell
Địa Ngục Burpee
50 burpees for time. Currently questioning all life decisions. Still going 🤮💪
50 burpees tính giờ. Đang đặt câu hỏi mọi quyết định trong đời. Vẫn tiếp 🤮💪

Portrait of {subject} mid-burpee, chest hitting the ground then explosively jumping up, completely drenched in sweat, puddle of sweat on the floor, raw exhaustion but refusing to quit, CrossFit box industrial setting, harsh fluorescent lighting, the epitome of pushing through
Time Cap Beat
Đánh Bại Thời Gian
FINISHED UNDER THE TIME CAP. Collapsed on the floor. This is what winning feels like 🏆💀✨
HOÀN THÀNH DƯỚI THỜI GIAN QUY ĐỊNH. Ngã sụp xuống sàn. Đây là cảm giác chiến thắng 🏆💀✨

Portrait of {subject} lying flat on the CrossFit box floor in the post-WOD collapse, staring at the ceiling, completely destroyed but with a triumphant smile, chalk marks on the floor, timer on the wall showing the finishing time, puddle of sweat, other athletes giving fist bumps, the beautiful devastation of a completed WOD

title: Dessert Crawl
Tour Ăn Tráng Miệng
desc: 5 dessert spots in one day — life is short, eat dessert first (and second, and third...)
5 tiệm tráng miệng trong một ngày — đời ngắn, ăn tráng miệng trước (và thứ hai, thứ ba...)
neg: blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, low quality, savory food, dark gloomy
style: bright colorful dessert photography, pastel tones, sweet aesthetic, natural daylight, Instagram-worthy
chs: Stop 1: Croissant Shop
Điểm 1: Tiệm Croissant
Starting with a butter croissant so flaky it should be illegal 🥐💛
Bắt đầu bằng croissant bơ giòn đến mức phải ra luật cấm 🥐💛

Portrait of {subject} at a cute French bakery, biting into a golden perfectly flaky croissant, buttery layers visible, crumbs falling, eyes rolling back in pleasure, charming bakery interior with pastry displays, warm morning light
Stop 2: Matcha Paradise
Điểm 2: Thiên Đường Matcha
This matcha tiramisu is a spiritual experience. I can see colors 🍵💚🌈
Matcha tiramisu này là trải nghiệm tâm linh. Mình thấy được màu sắc 🍵💚🌈

Portrait of {subject} at a Japanese-inspired dessert cafe, holding a spoonful of vibrant green matcha tiramisu, beautiful layered dessert in a glass, aesthetic green and white cafe interior, amazed delighted expression, soft natural lighting
Stop 3: Ice Cream Art
Điểm 3: Kem Nghệ Thuật
This ice cream cone is taller than my future. Too beautiful to eat but here we go 🍦🎨
Cây kem này cao hơn tương lai mình. Đẹp quá không nỡ ăn nhưng ăn thôi 🍦🎨

Portrait of {subject} holding an elaborately decorated artisan ice cream cone with multiple scoops and toppings, trying to eat it before it melts, ice cream starting to drip, colorful ice cream shop background with bright pastel walls, hurried but happy expression
Stop 4: Cake Slice
Điểm 4: Lát Bánh
Found a hidden cake shop. This strawberry shortcake just changed my whole life 🍰🍓✨
Tìm được tiệm bánh ẩn. Strawberry shortcake này vừa thay đổi cả cuộc đời 🍰🍓✨

Portrait of {subject} in a cozy hidden gem cake shop, forkful of perfect strawberry shortcake halfway to mouth, layers of cream and fresh strawberries visible, cute small cafe with vintage decor, afternoon light through lace curtains, pure dessert bliss expression
Stop 5: Chocolate Shop
Điểm 5: Tiệm Chocolate
Final stop: artisan chocolate shop. Ending on the sweetest note possible 🍫👑
Điểm cuối: tiệm chocolate thủ công. Kết thúc bằng nốt ngọt nhất có thể 🍫👑

Portrait of {subject} at an elegant chocolate shop, selecting from a beautiful display of artisan chocolates, holding a piece of dark chocolate, luxurious chocolate shop interior with glass cases full of bonbons, warm golden lighting, savoring the final dessert moment
Sugar Rush
Phê Đường
5 dessert shops DONE. I'm 90% sugar right now. Zero regrets. Would do it again tomorrow 🤤💕
5 tiệm tráng miệng XONG. Giờ 90% cơ thể là đường. Không hối hận. Ngày mai lại đi 🤤💕

Portrait of {subject} walking down a colorful street at golden hour, clutching stomach with a satisfied overwhelmed expression, carrying a small box of takeaway treats, slightly sugar-drunk happy walk, warm evening light, the satisfied face of someone who lived their sweetest life

title: Morning Run Routine
Thói Quen Chạy Bộ Sáng
desc: 5AM alarm, lace up, hit the streets — the morning run routine that starts every day right
Chuông 5 giờ sáng, buộc giày, ra đường — thói quen chạy sáng bắt đầu mỗi ngày đúng cách
neg: blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, low quality, gym, indoor, night
style: early morning golden light, urban running, dynamic motion, sunrise city atmosphere
chs: 5AM Alarm
Chuông 5 Giờ
5AM hits different when you choose it. Lacing up while the city sleeps 👟🌃
5 giờ sáng khác lắm khi tự chọn. Buộc giày trong khi thành phố ngủ 👟🌃

Portrait of {subject} sitting on the edge of bed in pre-dawn darkness, lacing up running shoes, phone alarm glowing 5:00 AM, determined sleepy expression, running clothes already on, dark room with city lights faintly visible through window
First Steps
Những Bước Đầu
First kilometer is always a lie. Your body says no. Keep going anyway 🏃💨
Km đầu luôn là lời nói dối. Cơ thể bảo không. Cứ chạy tiếp 🏃💨

Portrait of {subject} running on an empty city street in the pre-dawn blue hour, streetlights still on, breath visible in cool morning air, starting to find the rhythm, quiet city with no traffic, early morning urban runner solitude
The Zone
Vào Zone
Km 3 and the runner's high hits. Music pumping. This is the ZONE 🎧🔥
Km 3 và runner's high đến. Nhạc bơm. Đây là ZONE 🎧🔥

Portrait of {subject} running along a scenic city path, earphones in, completely in the zone, sunrise beginning to paint the sky orange and pink, shadows long on the ground, fluid running form, focused forward-looking expression, the magic middle kilometers
Sunrise Reward
Phần Thưởng Bình Minh
Caught the sunrise mid-run. This is why we wake up early. Views money can't buy 🌅😮‍💨
Bắt gặp bình minh giữa chặng chạy. Đây là lý do dậy sớm. View tiền không mua được 🌅😮‍💨

Portrait of {subject} pausing the run at a scenic overlook or bridge, sunrise exploding in golden and pink behind the city skyline, catching breath, sweat visible, amazed grateful expression at the sunrise, the perfect running reward moment
Final Sprint
Nước Rút Cuối
Last 500 meters. Give it EVERYTHING. Leave nothing in the tank 🏃‍♂️💥
500 mét cuối. Cho HẾT. Không giữ lại gì 🏃‍♂️💥

Portrait of {subject} sprinting hard on the final stretch, face showing maximum effort, arms pumping, feet pounding the pavement, early morning golden light, residential street with first signs of life, the gutsy final push, motion energy
Cool Down
Thư Giãn
Done. 7km in the books. Stretching as the world wakes up. Best version of me before 7AM 🧘‍♂️✅
Xong. 7km ghi sổ. Kéo giãn trong khi thế giới thức dậy. Bản thân tốt nhất trước 7 giờ sáng 🧘‍♂️✅

Portrait of {subject} stretching on a park bench after the morning run, morning sunlight warming the scene, sweat glistening, satisfied accomplished expression, running watch showing stats on wrist, city now waking up with people starting their day, the peaceful triumphant end of a morning run ritual
